event: View of Peterhof Palace grounds in autumn
description: A loose watercolor sketch of a courtyard scene at Peterhof Palace. Trees with golden and green autumn foliage frame a red-walled building with white-trimmed windows. A decorative statue or figure is visible atop a structure on the right. The painting is rendered in quick, fluid washes of warm autumnal colors — orange, gold, green, and red-brown — with a fresh, spontaneous quality.
